title: EnvironmentZ + The Bumblezone Compat
description: A Compat between EnvironmentZ and The Bumblezone to make temperatures in The Bumblezome dimension more realistic
body:
# Now integrated into The Bumblezone
### This is not needed if you are on The Bumblezone versions 7.7.0+ for 1.20.1 or 7.9.0+ for 1.21.1
A Compat between [EnvironmentZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/environmentz) and [The Bumblezone](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-bumblezone-fabric) to make temperatures in The Bumblezone dimension more realistic to that of a beehive (96 Degrees F).
